**Migration Guide — Cloud provider → OCI (TechCorp Brasil - ecommerce-migration)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (Cloud provider → OCI):**
| Cloud provider | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs Cloud provider

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in data transfer. Provide technical guidance on GoldenGate, Data Integration, and large-scale transfers.

Como implementar data transfer jobs com monitorar para a AutoDrive Systems no projeto container-platform (networking, ap-mumbai-1)? [context: shape=BM.Standard.E5, 8OCPUs, 500GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=192.168.0.0/16, ticket#76]

**Migration Guide — Cloud provider → OCI (AutoDrive Systems - container-platform)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (Cloud provider → OCI):**
| Cloud provider | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs Cloud provider

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Integration/overview.htm
You are an OCI DevOps specialist. Provide technical guidance on Vault secrets, pipeline secret injection, and rotation.

A EnergyGrid Monitor precisa resolver problemas de secrets para o projeto serverless-transformation. Como fazer no compartment security? [context: shape=BM.GPU4.8, 1OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.0.0.0/16, ticket#17]

**Security Audit — Secrets (EnergyGrid Monitor - serverless-transformation)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**
- [ ] Encryption em repouso (OCI Vault com chaves gerenciadas pelo cliente)
- [ ] Encryption em transito (TLS 1.2+)
- [ ] Backups automatizados e testados
- [ ] Cross-region replication para DR
- [ ] Object Storage com versionamento habilitado

**4. Monitoring & Compliance**
- [ ] OCI Cloud Guard habilitado
- [ ] Audit log ativado em todos os compartments
- [ ] Alarms para atividades suspeitas
- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

**Ferramentas de verificacao:**
- OCI Security Zones (bloqueia configuracoes inseguras)
- OCI Cloud Guard (detecta misconfigurations automaticamente)
- OCI Vulner Scanning (imagens de container e hosts)
- OCI Configuration Auditor (regras CIS Benchmark)

**Referencias:**
- [OCI Security Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Concepts/security.htm)
- [CIS Oracle Cloud Foundations Benchmark](https://www.cisecurity.org/benchmark/oracle_cloud)

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Monitoring. Provide technical guidance on metrics, alarms, and notifications.

Melhores praticas para configurar Monitoring disaster recovery no contexto FinServe Digital/disaster-recovery-setup (sandbox, eu-frankfurt-1) [context: shape=VM.Standard.E3.Flex, 8OCPUs, 500GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=192.168.0.0/16, ticket#124]

**Monitoring & Alerting — Monitoring (FinServe Digital - disaster-recovery-setup)**

**Metricas essenciais:**
| Metrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**Configuracao de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id sandbox \
  --display-name "high-cpu-sandbox" \
  --metric-compartment-id sandbox \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (analise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Monitoring/overview.htm

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Monitoring. Provide technical guidance on metrics, alarms, and notifications.

Quais sao os requisitos para configurar Monitoring security no ambiente da EnergyGrid Monitor (serverless-transformation)? [context: shape=VM.DenseIO.E4.Flex, 16OCPUs, 200GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=10.10.0.0/16, ticket#117]

**Monitoring & Alerting — Monitoring (EnergyGrid Monitor - serverless-transformation)**

**Metricas essenciais:**
| Metrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**Configuracao de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id security \
  --display-name "high-cpu-security" \
  --metric-compartment-id security \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (analise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Monitoring/overview.htm

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Cloud Storage to Object Storage migration.

Quais sao os requisitos para configurar monitoring GCP-OCI Storage no ambiente da SecureBank Corp (ci-cd-pipeline)? [context: shape=VM.GPU.A10.1, 4OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=172.16.0.0/16, ticket#131]

**Migration Guide — GCP → OCI (SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (GCP → OCI):**
| GCP | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs GCP

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in OCI PostgreSQL. Provide technical guidance on instance management, scaling, and high availability.
Quais etapas para criar OCI PostgreSQL da RetailMax Online (projeto compliance-audit, compartment shared-services)? [context: shape=BM.GPU4.8, 16OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.10.0.0/16, ticket#125]

**Disaster Recovery — Database (RetailMax Online - compliance-audit)**

**Autonomous Database:**
- Autonomous Data Guard: standby cross-region automatico
- RPO: 0 (sync replication), RTO: minutos
- Failover manual ou automatico via OCI
- Backup automatico: retém 60 dias

**MySQL HeatWave:**
- Point-in-time recovery: ate 5 minutos
- Cross-region read replica para DR
- Automated backups: retém 35 dias

**Recovery procedure:**
1. Verificar status do primary database
2. Promover standby para primary (Data Guard)
3. Atualizar connection strings na aplicacao
4. Validar integridade dos dados
5. Recriar standby na regiao original

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Database/Concepts/databaseoverview.htm

3. **OCI Logging**: Logs estruturados
4. **OCI IAM**: Politicas de acesso
5. **OCI Notifications**: Alertas e eventos

**Padrao comum:**
```
Recurso OCI → Events → Service Connector Hub → Destination
                                    ↓
                        ┌───────────┼───────────┐
                        ↓           ↓           ↓
                  Functions   Notifications  Streaming
```

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'production'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'production'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group production-functions to manage objects in compartment production
Allow dynamic-group production-functions to use secret-family in compartment production
```

**Disaster Recovery — Onprem Storage (BioResearch Labs - api-gateway-deployment)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicacao
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperacao
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

Descreva o processo de configurar data quality monitoring para SecureBank Corp (ci-cd-pipeline) em production/sa-saopaulo-1 [context: shape=VM.Standard3.Flex, 4OCPUs, 200GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=172.16.0.0/16, ticket#51]

**Migration Guide — Cloud provider → OCI (SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (Cloud provider → OCI):**
| Cloud provider | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs Cloud provider

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Integration/overview.htm

- Revise configuracoes periodicamente

Quais etapas para gerenciar chaves SSH da EduPlatform Global (projeto performance-tuning, compartment security)? [context: shape=VM.DenseIO.E4.Flex, 4OCPUs, 200GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=172.16.0.0/16, ticket#27]

**Performance Tuning — Compute (EduPlatform Global - performance-tuning)**

**Metricas criticas:**
| Metrica | Threshold | Acao |
|---------|-----------|------|
| CPU Utilization | >80% sustained | Scale up ou adicionar instancias |
| Memory | >85% | Verificar memory leaks, scale up |
| Network throughput | >70% da capacity | Considerar shape com mais bandwidth |
| Disk IOPS | >80% provisionadas | Aumentar performance tier do Block Volume |

**Otimizacoes de shape:**
- VM.DenseIO.E4.Flex: 4 OCPUs — ideal para workloads balanced
- Flexible shapes: ajuste OCPUs e memory independentemente
- Dense I/O: para workloads com alto IOPS local
- GPU: para ML inference e rendering

**Tuning de sistema operacional:**
- Kernel parameters: net.core.somaxconn, fs.file-max
- TCP: enable TCP BBR congestion control
- Storage: use paravirtualized attachment para latencia menor
- Oracle Cloud Agent: habilitar todos os plugins

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id ocid1.resource.us.e0103c7010dd506e638047f40c0dc6ab \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id ocid1.resource.us.e0103c7010dd506e638047f40c0dc6ab
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Performance Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/performance.htm)

**Disaster Recovery — Azure Storage (InsureTech Plus - identity-federation)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicacao
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperacao
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in Dynamic Groups. Provide technical guidance on dynamic group rules and instance principal.

Como implementar Dynamic Groups com auditar para a HealthTech Systems no projeto cost-optimization (networking, ap-mumbai-1)? [context: shape=VM.Standard3.Flex, 32OCPUs, 2000GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=10.20.0.0/16, ticket#6]

**Integration Pattern — Dynamic Groups (HealthTech Systems - cost-optimization)**

**Servicos OCI que integram com dynamic-groups:**
1. **OCI Vault**: Encryption keys e secrets management
2. **OCI Monitoring**: Metricas e alertas
3. **OCI Logging**: Logs estruturados
4. **OCI IAM**: Politicas de acesso
5. **OCI Notifications**: Alertas e eventos

**Padrao comum:**
```
Recurso OCI → Events → Service Connector Hub → Destination
                                    ↓
                        ┌───────────┼───────────┐
                        ↓           ↓           ↓
                  Functions   Notifications  Streaming
```

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'networking'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'networking'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group networking-functions to manage objects in compartment networking
Allow dynamic-group networking-functions to use secret-family in compartment networking
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Integration Patterns](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/integration.htm)

Implementacao via OCI CLI para instances - SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline:

```bash
oci container-instance container-instance create \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='production'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "instances-production-050" \
  --region sa-saopaulo-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci container-instance container-instance list \
  --compartment-id ocid1.cluster.us.b856b693842aacddaeb2ead7ec97a062 \
  --query "data[?"lifecycle-state"=='ACTIVE'].{name:"display-name",state:"lifecycle-state"}"
```

**Atualizar configuracao:**
```bash
oci container-instance container-instance update \
  --container-instance-id ocid1.cluster.sa.51ca3e5cc860203cde1c95d046bd2629 \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "SecureBank Corp - ci-cd-pipeline"}}' \
  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "production", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

**Monitoramento:**
```bash
oci container-instance container-instance get \
  --container-instance-id ocid1.cluster.sa.51ca3e5cc860203cde1c95d046bd2629 \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**
```bash
oci container-instance container-instance delete \
  --container-instance-id ocid1.cluster.sa.51ca3e5cc860203cde1c95d046bd2629 \
  --force
```

Diagnostico e resolucao de problemas para encryption - TravelHub Platform - monitoring-overhaul:

**Problema comum 1: Recurso nao inicia**
```bash
# Verificar estado do recurso
oci kms key get --key-id ocid1.vault.us.aa4572aa7d671d9fe13b24bcfb56d5d5 \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', error:'fault-domain'}"

# Verificar eventos recentes
oci audit event list \
  --compartment-id ocid1.vault.eu.5f91cab72699d96b4efda9f576308a00 \
  --query "data[?contains('request.resource.id', 'ocid1.vault.eu.5f91cab72699d96b4efda9f576308a00')]"
```

**Problema comum 2: Erro de permissao**
1. Verifique as IAM policies no compartment `development`

**Problema comum 3: Timeout de conexao**
1. Verifique Security Lists e NSGs
2. Confirme route tables e gateways
3. Teste conectividade com `nc` ou `telnet`

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in on-premises to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on file storage and data transfer.

Como implementar DFS para File Storage com migrar para a AutoDrive Systems no projeto container-platform (networking, ap-mumbai-1)? [context: shape=BM.Standard.E5, 8OCPUs, 500GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=192.168.0.0/16, ticket#76]

**Migration Guide — On-premises → OCI (AutoDrive Systems - container-platform)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (On-premises → OCI):**
| On-premises | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs On-premises

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Storage/Concepts/storageoverview.htm

**Security Audit — Vcn (AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**
- [ ] Encryption em repouso (OCI Vault com chaves gerenciadas pelo cliente)
- [ ] Encryption em transito (TLS 1.2+)
- [ ] Backups automatizados e testados
- [ ] Cross-region replication para DR
- [ ] Object Storage com versionamento habilitado

**4. Monitoring & Compliance**
- [ ] OCI Cloud Guard habilitado
- [ ] Audit log ativado em todos os compartments
- [ ] Alarms para atividades suspeitas
- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

**Ferramentas de verificacao:**
- OCI Security Zones (bloqueia configuracoes inseguras)
- OCI Cloud Guard (detecta misconfigurations automaticamente)
- OCI Vulner Scanning (imagens de container e hosts)
- OCI Configuration Auditor (regras CIS Benchmark)

- [OCI Security Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Concepts/security.htm)

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in OCI PostgreSQL. Provide technical guidance on instance management, scaling, and high availability.

Como implementar seguranca de PostgreSQL com configurar para a InsureTech Plus no projeto identity-federation (devops, me-jeddah-1)? [context: shape=VM.Standard.A1.Flex, 8OCPUs, 100GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=192.168.0.0/16, ticket#20]

**Disaster Recovery — Database (InsureTech Plus - identity-federation)**

**Autonomous Database:**
- Autonomous Data Guard: standby cross-region automatico
- RPO: 0 (sync replication), RTO: minutos
- Failover manual ou automatico via OCI
- Backup automatico: retém 60 dias

**MySQL HeatWave:**
- Point-in-time recovery: ate 5 minutos
- Cross-region read replica para DR
- Automated backups: retém 35 dias

**Recovery procedure:**
1. Verificar status do primary database
2. Promover standby para primary (Data Guard)
3. Atualizar connection strings na aplicacao
4. Validar integridade dos dados
5. Recriar standby na regiao original

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

**Disaster Recovery — Storage (FoodChain Trace - database-consolidation)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicacao
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperacao
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

Como migrar RDS read replicas para EduPlatform Global (performance-tuning) no compartment security (ap-tokyo-1)? [context: shape=VM.Standard.E4.Flex, 48OCPUs, 50GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=172.20.0.0/16, ticket#127]

**Migration Guide — AWS → OCI (EduPlatform Global - performance-tuning)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (AWS → OCI):**
| AWS | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs AWS

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

You are an OCI security specialist with expertise in IAM policies. Provide technical guidance on policy syntax, statements, and common patterns.
Como configurar instance principal para funções?

**Comparativo de Sintaxe OCI Policy:**

A sintaxe OCI é diferente de AWS IAM:

| Componente | OCI | AWS |
|------------|-----|-----|
| Principal | group/admingroup | arn:aws:iam:: |
| Verb | manage/use/read | ec2:* / s3:* |
| Resource | resource-family | arn:aws:ec2:* |
| Location | compartment/tenancy | region |

**Exemplos OCI:**
```
Allow dynamic-group FunctionsInstances to inspect object-family-family in tenancy
```

```
Allow group DataEngineers to use file-family-family in compartment DataPlatform
```

```
Allow dynamic-group BatchJobs to read vault-secrets-family in tenancy
```

**Exemplos equivalentes AWS (para referência em migração):**
```json
{
  "Effect": "Allow",
  "Action": ["s3:*"],
  "Resource": "arn:aws:s3:::bucket/*"
}
```

**Importante:** OCI usa `compartment` em vez de `account`, e `tenancy` em vez de `organization root`.

**Mais info:**
https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Identity/Concepts/policysyntax.htm

**Analise de Custos — Storage (CloudNative Inc - microservices-refactor)**

**Componentes de custo:**
1. **Provisionado vs utilizado**: Block Volume cobra pelo provisionado
2. **Tier de performance**: Higher IOPS = higher cost
3. **Data transfer**: Cross-region replication tem custo adicional
4. **Lifecycle policies**: Archive tier para dados raramente acessados

**Otimizacoes recomendadas:**
- Use Object Storage Standard para dados frequentemente acessados
- Mova para Archive/Infrequent Access apos 30 dias
- Delete unattached Block Volumes (cobranca continua)
- Compacte backups de Block Volume

**Referencia:** [OCI Storage Pricing](https://www.oracle.com/cloud/storage/pricing/)

**Dicas de otimizacao:**
- Monitore utilizacao real antes de dimensionar
- Automatize start/stop de ambientes non-production
- Use OCI Cost Analysis reports mensalmente
- Avalie serverless (Functions, Autonomous) para workloads variaveis

**Security Audit — Security (AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**
- [ ] Encryption em repouso (OCI Vault com chaves gerenciadas pelo cliente)
- [ ] Encryption em transito (TLS 1.2+)
- [ ] Backups automatizados e testados
- [ ] Cross-region replication para DR
- [ ] Object Storage com versionamento habilitado

**4. Monitoring & Compliance**
- [ ] OCI Cloud Guard habilitado
- [ ] Audit log ativado em todos os compartments
- [ ] Alarms para atividades suspeitas
- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

**Ferramentas de verificacao:**
- OCI Security Zones (bloqueia configuracoes inseguras)
- OCI Cloud Guard (detecta misconfigurations automaticamente)
- OCI Vulner Scanning (imagens de container e hosts)
- OCI Configuration Auditor (regras CIS Benchmark)

- [OCI Security Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Concepts/security.htm)
- [CIS Oracle Cloud Foundations Benchmark](https://www.cisecurity.org/benchmark/oracle_cloud)

```bash
oci mysql db-system update \
```

**Integration Pattern — Secrets (FinServe Digital - disaster-recovery-setup)**

**Servicos OCI que integram com secrets:**
1. **OCI Vault**: Encryption keys e secrets management
2. **OCI Monitoring**: Metricas e alertas
3. **OCI Logging**: Logs estruturados
4. **OCI IAM**: Politicas de acesso
5. **OCI Notifications**: Alertas e eventos

**Padrao comum:**
```
Recurso OCI → Events → Service Connector Hub → Destination
                                    ↓
                        ┌───────────┼───────────┐
                        ↓           ↓           ↓
                  Functions   Notifications  Streaming
```

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'sandbox'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'sandbox'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group sandbox-functions to manage objects in compartment sandbox
Allow dynamic-group sandbox-functions to use secret-family in compartment sandbox
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Integration Patterns](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/integration.htm)

- Auto indexing: Oracle cria/drop indices automaticamente

- AWR reports: identifica bottlenecks

**MySQL HeatWave:**
- HeatWave cluster: in-memory analytics 400x mais rapido
- Auto parallel load: otimiza dados para HeatWave

- Connection pooling: PgBouncer para >500 conexoes
- Autovacuum tuning: baseado em write workload
- Shared buffers: 25% da RAM disponivel

**Disaster Recovery — Gcp Compute (AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicacao
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperacao
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

**Criacao do recurso:**
```bash
oci api-gateway gateway create \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='analytics'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "api-gateway-analytics-058" \
  --region ap-sydney-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci api-gateway gateway list \
  --compartment-id ocid1.resource.us.9db4a1e964d5790bad52e3d2b5d2f065 \
  --query "data[?"lifecycle-state"=='ACTIVE'].{name:"display-name",state:"lifecycle-state"}"
```

**Atualizar configuracao:**
```bash
oci api-gateway gateway update \
  --gateway-id ocid1.resource.sa.200115ed1b5d0a478099a360914fbae8 \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "LegalDoc Manager - network-segmentation"}}' \
  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "analytics", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

**Monitoramento:**
```bash
oci api-gateway gateway get \
  --gateway-id ocid1.resource.sa.200115ed1b5d0a478099a360914fbae8 \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**
```bash
oci api-gateway gateway delete \
  --gateway-id ocid1.resource.sa.200115ed1b5d0a478099a360914fbae8 \
  --force
```

**Parametros utilizados:**
- Compartment: `analytics`
- Region: `ap-sydney-1`

- OCPUs: `4`
- Storage: `1000 GB`

Best practices para vault-keys - AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration:

**1. Planejamento e Design**
- Defina claramente os requisitos de vault-keys
- Escolha a regiao `me-jeddah-1` baseada em latencia e compliance
- Use o compartment `devops` para isolamento logico
- Documente arquitetura e dependencias

**2. Implementacao**
- Use Infrastructure as Code (Terraform recomendado)
- Implemente tagging consistente:
  - `project: AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration`
  - `environment: devops`
  - `managed-by: terraform`
- Configure monitoring desde o inicio
- Implemente backup automatizado

**3. Seguranca**
- Aplique principio de menor privilegio
- Use encryption em repouso e em transito
- Configure network security adequadamente
- Habilite audit logging

**4. Operacao**
- Configure alertas proativos
- Implemente runbooks para operacoes comuns
- Realize testes de disaster recovery
- Monitore custos regularmente

**5. Otimizacao**
- Right-size recursos baseado em uso real
- Use auto-scaling quando aplicavel
- Considere preemptible instances para workloads tolerantes
- Revise configuracoes periodicamente

**Configuracao de referencia:**
- Shape: `BM.Standard.E5`
- OCPUs: `2`
- Storage: `500 GB`
- Region: `me-jeddah-1`

**Avisos importantes:**
- [MUTABLE] Precos variam por regiao e configuracao
- Sempre valide em ambiente de teste antes de producao
- Mantenha backups atualizados
- Documente todas as alteracoes

**Integration Pattern — Observability (TravelHub Platform - monitoring-overhaul)**

**Arquitetura de Observabilidade:**
```
Applications → OCI Logging ──┐
                             ↓
Infrastructure → OCI Monitoring → Service Connector Hub
                             ↓
User Experience → OCI APM ───┘
            ↓
    OCI Notifications
            ↓
    PagerDuty / Slack / Email
```

**Service Connector Hub flows:**
- Logs → Object Storage (compliance archive)
- Logs → Functions (real-time processing)
- Metrics → Notifications (alerting)
- Audit → Streaming (security analysis)

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'development'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'development'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group development-functions to manage objects in compartment development
Allow dynamic-group development-functions to use secret-family in compartment development
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Integration Patterns](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/integration.htm)

**Disaster Recovery — Azure Compute (AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicacao
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperacao
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in VMware to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on VMware Cloud Foundation and hybrid connectivity.

Quais etapas para migrar vCenter para OCI da LegalDoc Manager (projeto network-segmentation, compartment analytics)? [context: shape=BM.Standard.E5, 4OCPUs, 50GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=172.16.0.0/16, ticket#139]

**Migration Guide — On-premises → OCI (LegalDoc Manager - network-segmentation)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (On-premises → OCI):**
| On-premises | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs On-premises

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/cloud-migration/home.htm

Diagnostico e resolucao de problemas para database - TechCorp Brasil - ecommerce-migration:

**Problema comum 1: Recurso nao inicia**
```bash
# Verificar estado do recurso
oci db autonomous-database get --autonomous-database-id ocid1.database.sa.80b9a4856602ac66eebdc1a4d85fdfe6 \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', error:'fault-domain'}"

# Verificar eventos recentes
oci audit event list \
  --compartment-id ocid1.database.us.5de7cb44f0260e9c24b201bd2a05ec68 \
  --query "data[?contains('request.resource.id', 'ocid1.database.us.5de7cb44f0260e9c24b201bd2a05ec68')]"
```

**Problema comum 2: Erro de permissao**
1. Verifique as IAM policies no compartment `production`
2. Confirme que o usuario/grupo tem acesso ao servico
3. Verifique dynamic groups se usando instance principal

**Problema comum 3: Timeout de conexao**
1. Verifique Security Lists e NSGs
2. Confirme route tables e gateways
3. Teste conectividade com `nc` ou `telnet`

**Checklist de validacao:**
- [ ] Recurso esta no estado correto?
- [ ] Permissoes IAM configuradas?
- [ ] Networking configurado corretamente?
- [ ] Logs mostram erros?
- [ ] Metricas dentro do esperado?

**Performance Tuning — Database (GameForge Studios - zero-trust-implementation)**

**Autonomous Database:**
- Auto scaling: 1-20x OCPUs baseado em carga
- Auto indexing: Oracle cria/drop indices automaticamente
- SQL Performance Analyzer: testa queries antes de deploy
- AWR reports: identifica bottlenecks

**MySQL HeatWave:**
- HeatWave cluster: in-memory analytics 400x mais rapido
- Auto parallel load: otimiza dados para HeatWave
- Query rewrite: otimiza queries automaticamente

**PostgreSQL:**
- Connection pooling: PgBouncer para >500 conexoes
- Autovacuum tuning: baseado em write workload
- Shared buffers: 25% da RAM disponivel

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id ocid1.database.eu.9ca3e55cabb6c59551dac9e33f81a2ca \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id ocid1.database.eu.9ca3e55cabb6c59551dac9e33f81a2ca
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Performance Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/performance.htm)

You are an OCI troubleshooting specialist with expertise in performance. Provide diagnostic guidance on CPU, memory, storage, and network performance.

Como implementar storage tier performance com diagnosticar para a TravelHub Platform no projeto monitoring-overhaul (development, us-ashburn-1)? [context: shape=VM.Standard3.Flex, 8OCPUs, 2000GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=192.168.0.0/16, ticket#132]

**Monitoring & Alerting — Performance (TravelHub Platform - monitoring-overhaul)**

**Metricas essenciais:**
| Metrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**Configuracao de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id development \
  --display-name "high-cpu-development" \
  --metric-compartment-id development \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (analise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

**Performance Tuning — Load Balancer (HealthTech Systems - cost-optimization)**

**Metodologia de benchmark:**
1. Establish baseline com metricas atuais
2. Identificar bottleneck (CPU, memory, I/O, network)

**Analise de Custos — Storage (EduPlatform Global - performance-tuning)**

**Componentes de custo:**
1. **Provisionado vs utilizado**: Block Volume cobra pelo provisionado
2. **Tier de performance**: Higher IOPS = higher cost
3. **Data transfer**: Cross-region replication tem custo adicional
4. **Lifecycle policies**: Archive tier para dados raramente acessados

**Otimizacoes recomendadas:**
- Use Object Storage Standard para dados frequentemente acessados
- Mova para Archive/Infrequent Access apos 30 dias
- Delete unattached Block Volumes (cobranca continua)
- Compacte backups de Block Volume

**Referencia:** [OCI Storage Pricing](https://www.oracle.com/cloud/storage/pricing/)

**Dicas de otimizacao:**
- Monitore utilizacao real antes de dimensionar
- Automatize start/stop de ambientes non-production
- Use OCI Cost Analysis reports mensalmente
- Avalie serverless (Functions, Autonomous) para workloads variaveis

**Security Audit — Encryption (AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**
- [ ] Encryption em repouso (OCI Vault com chaves gerenciadas pelo cliente)
- [ ] Encryption em transito (TLS 1.2+)
- [ ] Backups automatizados e testados
- [ ] Cross-region replication para DR
- [ ] Object Storage com versionamento habilitado

**4. Monitoring & Compliance**
- [ ] OCI Cloud Guard habilitado
- [ ] Audit log ativado em todos os compartments
- [ ] Alarms para atividades suspeitas
- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

**IAM Policy recomendada:**
```
Allow group developers-devops to manage vaults in compartment devops
Allow group developers-devops to manage keys in compartment devops
Allow group developers-devops to manage secrets in compartment devops
Allow service blockstorage to use secret-family in compartment devops
```

**Ferramentas de verificacao:**
- OCI Security Zones (bloqueia configuracoes inseguras)
- OCI Cloud Guard (detecta misconfigurations automaticamente)
- OCI Vulner Scanning (imagens de container e hosts)
- OCI Configuration Auditor (regras CIS Benchmark)

**Referencias:**
- [OCI Security Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Concepts/security.htm)
- [CIS Oracle Cloud Foundations Benchmark](https://www.cisecurity.org/benchmark/oracle_cloud)

**Integration Pattern — Dynamic Groups (AutoDrive Systems - container-platform)**

**Servicos OCI que integram com dynamic-groups:**
1. **OCI Vault**: Encryption keys e secrets management
2. **OCI Monitoring**: Metricas e alertas
3. **OCI Logging**: Logs estruturados
4. **OCI IAM**: Politicas de acesso
5. **OCI Notifications**: Alertas e eventos

**Padrao comum:**
```
Recurso OCI → Events → Service Connector Hub → Destination
                                    ↓
                        ┌───────────┼───────────┐
                        ↓           ↓           ↓
                  Functions   Notifications  Streaming
```

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'networking'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'networking'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group networking-functions to manage objects in compartment networking
Allow dynamic-group networking-functions to use secret-family in compartment networking
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Integration Patterns](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/integration.htm)

**Disaster Recovery — Database (AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicacao
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperacao
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

Quais sao os requisitos para configurar devops no ambiente da RetailMax Online (compliance-audit)? [context: shape=VM.GPU.A10.1, 16OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.10.0.0/16, ticket#5]

**Integration Pattern — DevOps (RetailMax Online - compliance-audit)**

**CI/CD Pipeline:**
```
Git Repo → OCI DevOps Build → OCIR → OKE / Compute
                ↓
        OCI DevOps Deploy
                ↓
        OCI Functions / Compute Instance Group
                ↓
        OCI Monitoring (health check)
```

**Infrastructure as Code:**
- Terraform via OCI Resource Manager
- State management em Object Storage
- Plans automaticos em MRs
- Apply via pipeline aprovado

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'shared-services'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'shared-services'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group shared-services-functions to manage objects in compartment shared-services
Allow dynamic-group shared-services-functions to use secret-family in compartment shared-services
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Integration Patterns](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/integration.htm)

Best practices para load-balancer - FinServe Digital - disaster-recovery-setup:

**1. Planejamento e Design**
- Defina claramente os requisitos de load-balancer
- Escolha a regiao `eu-frankfurt-1` baseada em latencia e compliance
- Use o compartment `sandbox` para isolamento logico
- Documente arquitetura e dependencias

**2. Implementacao**
- Use Infrastructure as Code (Terraform recomendado)
- Implemente tagging consistente:
  - `project: FinServe Digital - disaster-recovery-setup`
  - `environment: sandbox`
  - `managed-by: terraform`
- Configure monitoring desde o inicio
- Implemente backup automatizado

**3. Seguranca**
- Aplique principio de menor privilegio
- Use encryption em repouso e em transito
- Configure network security adequadamente
- Habilite audit logging

**4. Operacao**
- Configure alertas proativos
- Implemente runbooks para operacoes comuns
- Realize testes de disaster recovery
- Monitore custos regularmente

**5. Otimizacao**
- Right-size recursos baseado em uso real
- Use auto-scaling quando aplicavel
- Considere preemptible instances para workloads tolerantes
- Revise configuracoes periodicamente

**Configuracao de referencia:**
- Shape: `VM.Standard.E3.Flex`
- OCPUs: `8`
- Storage: `500 GB`
- Region: `eu-frankfurt-1`

**Avisos importantes:**
- [MUTABLE] Precos variam por regiao e configuracao
- Sempre valide em ambiente de teste antes de producao
- Mantenha backups atualizados
- Documente todas as alteracoes

**Integration Pattern — Secrets (TravelHub Platform - monitoring-overhaul)**

**Servicos OCI que integram com secrets:**
1. **OCI Vault**: Encryption keys e secrets management
2. **OCI Monitoring**: Metricas e alertas
3. **OCI Logging**: Logs estruturados
4. **OCI IAM**: Politicas de acesso
5. **OCI Notifications**: Alertas e eventos

**Padrao comum:**
```
Recurso OCI → Events → Service Connector Hub → Destination
                                    ↓
                        ┌───────────┼───────────┐
                        ↓           ↓           ↓
                  Functions   Notifications  Streaming
```

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'development'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'development'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group development-functions to manage objects in compartment development
Allow dynamic-group development-functions to use secret-family in compartment development
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Integration Patterns](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/integration.htm)

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Azure to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on Azure VMs to OCI Compute migration.

A RetailMax Online precisa migrar VNETs para VCNs para o projeto compliance-audit. Como fazer no compartment shared-services? [context: shape=VM.DenseIO.E4.Flex, 16OCPUs, 200GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=10.10.0.0/16, ticket#45]

**Disaster Recovery — Azure Compute (RetailMax Online - compliance-audit)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicacao
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperacao
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm

**Monitoring & Alerting — Security (TravelHub Platform - monitoring-overhaul)**

**Metricas essenciais:**
| Metrica | Namespace | Alarm Threshold | Severidade |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| CPU Utilization | oci_computeagent | >80% por 5min | Warning |
| Memory Utilization | oci_computeagent | >85% por 5min | Critical |
| Disk Read/Write Ops | oci_blockstorage | >90% IOPS provisionadas | Warning |
| Network Bytes In/Out | oci_computeagent | >70% bandwidth | Warning |
| Database Connections | oci_database | >80% max connections | Critical |

**Configuracao de alarmes:**
```bash
# Criar alarme de CPU
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id development \
  --display-name "high-cpu-development" \
  --metric-compartment-id development \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --query "CpuUtilization[1m]{resourceId = '<instance-ocid>'}.mean > 80" \
  --severity WARNING \
  --destination-credentials '{"topicId": "ocid1.onstopic..."}' \
  --body "CPU utilization exceeded 80% for 5 minutes" \
  --repeat-notification-duration PT1H
```

**Dashboard recomendado:**
1. **Infrastructure**: CPU, memory, disk, network por instancia
2. **Database**: Connections, queries/sec, storage, replication lag
3. **Application**: Response time, error rate, throughput
4. **Cost**: Daily spend, budget alerts, anomaly detection

**Service Connector Hub — Pipeline de logs:**
1. OCI Logging → Object Storage (archive)
2. OCI Logging → OCI Functions (processamento)
3. OCI Monitoring → Notifications (PagerDuty, Slack)
4. OCI Audit → Streaming (analise em tempo real)

**Best practices:**
- Alarms com duration para evitar alertas de spike
- Escalar notifications por severidade (email → SMS → PagerDuty)
- Dashboards por equipe e por workload
- Revisar thresholds mensalmente baseado em baseline

**Referencia:** [OCI Monitoring](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/monitoring/home.htm)

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Cloud Storage to Object Storage migration.

Melhores praticas para migrar GCP transfer service no contexto AutoDrive Systems/container-platform (networking, ap-mumbai-1) [context: shape=VM.Standard3.Flex, 64OCPUs, 2000GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=192.168.10.0/24, ticket#96]

**Migration Guide — GCP → OCI (AutoDrive Systems - container-platform)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (GCP → OCI):**
| GCP | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs GCP

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Implementacao via OCI CLI para authentication - LogiTrack Logistics - security-hardening:

**Criacao do recurso:**
```bash
oci iam compartment create \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='data-platform'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "authentication-data-platform-127" \
  --region ca-toronto-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci iam compartment list \
  --compartment-id ocid1.resource.eu.20756638f4253f3e29ebb1897ba0b77e \
  --query "data[?"lifecycle-state"=='ACTIVE'].{name:"name",state:"lifecycle-state"}"
```

**Atualizar configuracao:**
```bash
oci iam user update \
  --compartment-id ocid1.resource.us.de884f27333c781bb1d2bada5a81a8a3 \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "LogiTrack Logistics - security-hardening"}}' \
  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "data-platform", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

**Monitoramento:**
```bash
oci iam user get \
  --compartment-id ocid1.resource.us.de884f27333c781bb1d2bada5a81a8a3 \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**
```bash
oci iam user delete \
  --compartment-id ocid1.resource.us.de884f27333c781bb1d2bada5a81a8a3 \
  --force
```

**Parametros utilizados:**
- Compartment: `data-platform`
- Region: `ca-toronto-1`
- Shape: `VM.Standard.A1.Flex`
- OCPUs: `64`
- Storage: `100 GB`

**Performance Tuning — Storage (HealthTech Systems - cost-optimization)**

**Block Volume Performance Tiers:**
| Tier | IOPS/GB | Throughput/GB | Use Case |
|------|---------|---------------|----------|
| Balanced | 10 | 480KB/s | General purpose |
| Higher Performance | 20 | 960KB/s | Databases |
| Ultra High Performance | 75 | 3.6MB/s | High-throughput workloads |

**Otimizacoes:**
- Stripe multiplos Block Volumes para IOPS agregados
- Use NVMe local em Dense I/O shapes para maximo throughput
- Object Storage: multipart upload para arquivos >100MB
- File Storage: ajuste throughput mode (elastic vs provisioned)
- Enable paravirtualized attachment para menor latencia

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id ocid1.bucket.eu.c5a70603d8e9b7757e780047d3cb09e9 \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id ocid1.bucket.eu.c5a70603d8e9b7757e780047d3cb09e9
```

**Security Audit — Waf (AgriTech Innovations - hybrid-cloud-integration)**

**Checklist de Seguranca:**

**1. Identity & Access Management**
- [ ] Policies com principio de menor privilegio
- [ ] Grupos IAM organizados por funcao (nao por pessoa)
- [ ] MFA habilitado para todos os usuarios
- [ ] API keys rotacionadas a cada 90 dias
- [ ] Dynamic groups para workloads (nao user credentials)

**2. Network Security**
- [ ] Security lists restritivas (deny by default)
- [ ] Network Security Groups por workload
- [ ] WAF habilitado para aplicacoes web publicas
- [ ] Private endpoints para servicos OCI
- [ ] Sem subnets publicas com acesso direto a databases

**3. Data Protection**
- [ ] Encryption em repouso (OCI Vault com chaves gerenciadas pelo cliente)
- [ ] Encryption em transito (TLS 1.2+)
- [ ] Backups automatizados e testados
- [ ] Cross-region replication para DR
- [ ] Object Storage com versionamento habilitado

**4. Monitoring & Compliance**
- [ ] OCI Cloud Guard habilitado
- [ ] Audit log ativado em todos os compartments
- [ ] Alarms para atividades suspeitas
- [ ] Revisao trimestral de acesso
- [ ] Compliance com regulamentacoes aplicaveis

**Ferramentas de verificacao:**
- OCI Security Zones (bloqueia configuracoes inseguras)
- OCI Cloud Guard (detecta misconfigurations automaticamente)
- OCI Vulner Scanning (imagens de container e hosts)
- OCI Configuration Auditor (regras CIS Benchmark)

**Referencias:**
- [OCI Security Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/Security/Concepts/security.htm)
- [CIS Oracle Cloud Foundations Benchmark](https://www.cisecurity.org/benchmark/oracle_cloud)

4. **OCI IAM**: Politicas de acesso
5. **OCI Notifications**: Alertas e eventos

**Padrao comum:**
```
Recurso OCI → Events → Service Connector Hub → Destination
                                    ↓
                        ┌───────────┼───────────┐
                        ↓           ↓           ↓
                  Functions   Notifications  Streaming
```

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'sandbox'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'sandbox'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group sandbox-functions to manage objects in compartment sandbox
Allow dynamic-group sandbox-functions to use secret-family in compartment sandbox
```

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Compute scaling. Provide technical guidance on instance pools, auto-scaling, and capacity planning.

Quais etapas para otimizar custos de auto-scaling da TechCorp Brasil (projeto ecommerce-migration, compartment production)? [context: shape=VM.GPU.A10.1, 1OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.0.0.0/16, ticket#41]

**Performance Tuning — Compute (TechCorp Brasil - ecommerce-migration)**

**Metricas criticas:**
| Metrica | Threshold | Acao |
|---------|-----------|------|
| CPU Utilization | >80% sustained | Scale up ou adicionar instancias |
| Memory | >85% | Verificar memory leaks, scale up |
| Network throughput | >70% da capacity | Considerar shape com mais bandwidth |
| Disk IOPS | >80% provisionadas | Aumentar performance tier do Block Volume |

**Otimizacoes de shape:**
- VM.GPU.A10.1: 1 OCPUs — ideal para workloads balanced
- Flexible shapes: ajuste OCPUs e memory independentemente
- Dense I/O: para workloads com alto IOPS local
- GPU: para ML inference e rendering

**Tuning de sistema operacional:**
- Kernel parameters: net.core.somaxconn, fs.file-max
- TCP: enable TCP BBR congestion control
- Storage: use paravirtualized attachment para latencia menor
- Oracle Cloud Agent: habilitar todos os plugins

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory
oci monitoring metric-data summarize-metrics \
  --compartment-id ocid1.resource.us.3efbb08b7281789306f759195c23f8a5 \
  --query-text "CpuUtilization[1m].maximum"

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume
oci bv volume-performance get --volume-id ocid1.resource.us.3efbb08b7281789306f759195c23f8a5
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Performance Best Practices](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/performance.htm)

**Performance Tuning — Storage (FinServe Digital - disaster-recovery-setup)**

**Block Volume Performance Tiers:**
| Tier | IOPS/GB | Throughput/GB | Use Case |
|------|---------|---------------|----------|
| Balanced | 10 | 480KB/s | General purpose |
| Higher Performance | 20 | 960KB/s | Databases |
| Ultra High Performance | 75 | 3.6MB/s | High-throughput workloads |

**Otimizacoes:**
- Stripe multiplos Block Volumes para IOPS agregados
- Use NVMe local em Dense I/O shapes para maximo throughput
- Object Storage: multipart upload para arquivos >100MB
- File Storage: ajuste throughput mode (elastic vs provisioned)
- Enable paravirtualized attachment para menor latencia

**Comandos de diagnostico:**
```bash
# Monitorar CPU e memory

  --compartment-id ocid1.bucket.eu.44ff2b2d936b82d7e3bea899a37ffd7d \

# Verificar throughput de Block Volume

```

Como migrar GCP Cloud Spanner para ADB para MediaStream Pro (multi-region-expansion) no compartment analytics (ap-sydney-1)? [context: shape=VM.Standard.A1.Flex, 16OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.10.0.0/16, ticket#29]

**Disaster Recovery — Gcp Database (MediaStream Pro - multi-region-expansion)**

**Framework de DR:**
1. **Assess**: Identificar workloads criticos e RPO/RTO
2. **Protect**: Implementar backups e replicacao
3. **Recover**: Documentar runbooks de recuperacao
4. **Test**: Simular failover trimestralmente

**OCI DR Services:**
- OCI GoldenGate: replicacao de dados em tempo real
- OCI Data Guard: database standby automatico
- Cross-region replication: Object Storage, Block Volume
- Resource Manager: infraestrutura como codigo para rebuild

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

Quais etapas para configurar disaster recovery de Exadata da TechCorp Brasil (projeto ecommerce-migration, compartment production)? [context: shape=VM.GPU.A10.1, 1OCPUs, 1000GB, AD=AD-2, CIDR=10.0.0.0/16, ticket#41]

**Disaster Recovery — Database (TechCorp Brasil - ecommerce-migration)**

**Autonomous Database:**
- Autonomous Data Guard: standby cross-region automatico
- RPO: 0 (sync replication), RTO: minutos
- Failover manual ou automatico via OCI
- Backup automatico: retém 60 dias

**MySQL HeatWave:**
- Point-in-time recovery: ate 5 minutos
- Cross-region read replica para DR
- Automated backups: retém 35 dias

**Recovery procedure:**
1. Verificar status do primary database
2. Promover standby para primary (Data Guard)
3. Atualizar connection strings na aplicacao
4. Validar integridade dos dados
5. Recriar standby na regiao original

**Runbook de teste de DR:**
1. Notificar equipe de teste
2. Simular falha na regiao primaria
3. Executar failover para regiao secundaria
4. Validar aplicacao e dados
5. Failback para regiao primaria
6. Documentar licoes aprendidas

**Metricas de sucesso:**
- RPO real <= RPO planejado
- RTO real <= RTO planejado
- Zero data loss para workloads criticos

**Integration Pattern — Dynamic Groups (DataFlow Solutions - data-lake-modernization)**

**Servicos OCI que integram com dynamic-groups:**
1. **OCI Vault**: Encryption keys e secrets management
2. **OCI Monitoring**: Metricas e alertas
3. **OCI Logging**: Logs estruturados
4. **OCI IAM**: Politicas de acesso
5. **OCI Notifications**: Alertas e eventos

**Padrao comum:**
```
Recurso OCI → Events → Service Connector Hub → Destination
                                    ↓
                        ┌───────────┼───────────┐
                        ↓           ↓           ↓
                  Functions   Notifications  Streaming
```

**Dynamic Groups para integracao:**
```
ALL {resource.type = 'fnfunc', resource.compartment.id = 'development'}
ALL {resource.type = 'compute', resource.compartment.id = 'development'}
```

**Policies necessarias:**
```
Allow dynamic-group development-functions to manage objects in compartment development
Allow dynamic-group development-functions to use secret-family in compartment development
```

**Referencia:** [OCI Integration Patterns](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/integration.htm)

A SmartCity IoT precisa migrar Oracle on-premises para Exadata para o projeto backup-strategy. Como fazer no compartment staging? [context: shape=VM.Standard.E4.Flex, 1OCPUs, 50GB, AD=AD-1, CIDR=10.0.0.0/16, ticket#73]

Implementacao via OCI CLI para exadata - SmartCity IoT - backup-strategy:

**Criacao do recurso:**
```bash
oci db system create \
  --compartment-id $(oci iam compartment list \
    --query "data[?name=='staging'].id | [0]") \
  --display-name "exadata-staging-072" \
  --region us-phoenix-1 \
  --wait-for-state AVAILABLE
```

**Listar recursos existentes:**
```bash
oci db system list \
  --compartment-id ocid1.database.us.21dae12ec0274d0e33036a1372c98588 \
  --query "data[?"lifecycle-state"=='AVAILABLE'].{name:"display-name",shape:"shape"}"
```

**Atualizar configuracao:**
```bash
oci db system update \
  --db-system-id ocid1.database.sa.0c38a3f4e057a872869495ad89bd9620 \
  --defined-tags '{"project": {"name": "SmartCity IoT - backup-strategy"}}' \
  --freeform-tags '{"environment": "staging", "managed-by": "cli"}'
```

**Monitoramento:**
```bash
oci db system get \
  --db-system-id ocid1.database.sa.0c38a3f4e057a872869495ad89bd9620 \
  --query "data.{state:'lifecycle-state', time:'time-created'}"
```

**Remocao (com cuidado):**
```bash
oci db system delete \
  --db-system-id ocid1.database.sa.0c38a3f4e057a872869495ad89bd9620 \
  --force
```

**Parametros utilizados:**
- Compartment: `staging`
- Region: `us-phoenix-1`
- Shape: `VM.Standard.E4.Flex`
- OCPUs: `1`
- Storage: `50 GB`

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Cloud Storage to Object Storage migration.

Como implementar GCP Storage encryption com migrar para a HealthTech Systems no projeto cost-optimization (networking, ap-mumbai-1)? [context: shape=VM.Standard3.Flex, 32OCPUs, 2000GB, AD=AD-3, CIDR=10.20.0.0/16, ticket#6]

**Migration Guide — GCP → OCI (HealthTech Systems - cost-optimization)**

**Mapeamento de servicos (GCP → OCI):**
| GCP | OCI | CLI Command |
|----------|-----|-------------|
| VM instances | OCI Compute | `oci compute instance launch` |
| Cloud storage | Object Storage | `oci os object put` |
| Managed database | Autonomous Database | `oci db autonomous-database create` |

**Fases da migracao:**

**Fase 1: Assessment (1-2 semanas)**
- Inventariar workloads e dependencias
- Classificar por criticidade e complexidade
- Definir estrategia: rehost, replatform, refactor
- Estimar custos OCI vs GCP

**Fase 2: Foundation (1-2 semanas)**
- Criar VCN, subnets, gateways
- Configurar IAM, compartments, policies
- Estabelecer conectividade (IPSec/FastConnect)
- Configurar monitoring e logging

**Fase 3: Migration (2-4 semanas)**
- Migrar dados primeiro (Database Migration Service)
- Migrar aplicacoes (lift-and-shift ou replatform)
- Validar funcionalidade e performance
- Executar cutover com minimo downtime

**Fase 4: Optimization (continuo)**
- Right-size resources baseado em metricas reais
- Implementar auto-scaling
- Otimizar custos com Universal Credits
- Documentar runbooks OCI

**Ferramentas de migracao OCI:**
- **Database Migration Service**: Online migration com minimo downtime
- **Data Transfer Service**: Appliance fisico para grandes volumes
- **Object Storage Migration Service**: Migracao direta entre clouds
- **VMware Solution**: Lift-and-shift de workloads VMware
- **oci-cli**: Automacao de provisioning

**Checklist de cutover:**
- [ ] DNS atualizado para endpoints OCI
- [ ] SSL/TLS certificates instalados
- [ ] Health checks passando
- [ ] Monitoring e alertas ativos
- [ ] Backup configurado
- [ ] Runbook de rollback preparado

**Referencia:** [OCI Migration Guide](https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/migration.htm)

Documentacao: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm
